chart.title: Se obtuvieron 500 registros relevantes para inventario.

business_response_composer.que_entendi: Entendí una consulta del dominio inventario logistica con intención inventory stock by mobile
business_response_composer.datos_usados: Datos usados: base_codigos, logistica_movimientos_entrega, logistica_movimientos_consumo, logistica_movimientos_cobro
business_response_composer.alertas: El volumen de resultados puede requerir priorizacion para una lectura ejecutiva

query_intelligence.query: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(p.movil), '') AS movil, mov.cedula AS cedula, COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '') AS nombre, COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '') AS apellido, TRIM(CONCAT(SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.nombre), '')), ' ', 1), CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '')) = '' THEN '' ELSE CONCAT(' ', SUBSTRING_INDEX(TRIM(COALESCE(MAX(p.apellido), '')), ' ', 1)) END)) AS empleado, SUM(mov.entradas - mov.entregas + mov.devoluciones - mov.consumos - mov.cobros) AS saldo_total_materiales, SUM(mov.registros_cantidad_invalida) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM (SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_entrega GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_consumo GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(0) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_cobro GROUP BY codigo, cedula UNION ALL SELECT codigo AS codigo, cedula AS cedula, SUM(0) AS entradas, SUM(0) AS entregas, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN CAST(cantidad AS DECIMAL(18,4)) ELSE 0 END) AS devoluciones, SUM(0) AS consumos, SUM(0) AS cobros, SUM(0) AS traslados_otro_aliado, SUM(0) AS traslados_bodega, SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(COALESCE(cantidad, '')) REGEXP '^-?[0-9]+([.][0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS registros_cantidad_invalida FROM logistica_movimientos_devolucion GROUP BY codigo, cedula) AS mov LEFT JOIN bd_c3nc4s1s.cinco_base_de_personal AS p ON p.cedula = mov.cedula GROUP BY COALESCE(p.movil, ''), mov.cedula HAVING saldo_total_materiales <> 0 OR registros_cantidad_invalida > 0 ORDER BY saldo_total_materiales ASC, movil ASC, mov.cedula ASC LIMIT 500

warnings: La consulta pide inventario por cuadrilla y un saldo total mostrando datos del empleado; en el contexto logístico esto se interpreta como balance/inventario asociado a la unidad móvil (cuadrilla) con identificación del personal relacionado. No se especifica bodega, fecha ni mater
